# Bogi Horvath — Senior Business Analyst & Digital Transformation Lead

> Professional portfolio of Boglarka Paczari-Horvath (Bogi Horvath). 14+ years delivering EUR 700k+ in documented savings across SAP S/4HANA, PEGA, and AI-augmented process optimization. Based in Belgium (remote), available for Senior BA / Transformation Lead roles globally.

## Who

- **Name:** Boglarka Paczari-Horvath (Bogi Horvath)
- **Title:** Senior Business Analyst & Digital Transformation Lead
- **Location:** Belgium, 100% remote, serves clients globally
- **Contact:** horvath.boglarka@hotmail.com | https://www.linkedin.com/in/boglarka-paczari-horvath/
- **Resume (PDF):** https://bogihorvath.com/Bogi_CV.pdf
- **Languages:** English (full professional), Hungarian (native), German (intermediate)

## Core expertise

Business Analysis, Digital Transformation, Process Optimization, Lean Six Sigma (Green Belt, DMAIC), Agile, ITIL Service Management, PRINCE2, Change Management, SAP S/4HANA, PEGA, API consolidation, AI-augmented productivity (Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini).

## Career highlights

- **2025–present — Functional Lead, S.W.I.F.T. (Belgium, remote):** E-form optimization and global API consolidation for financial message handling. Leads 3–5 specialists.
- **2024–2025 — Senior Order Fulfilment BA, S.W.I.F.T.:** Delivered 20% productivity gain via SAP S/4HANA to PEGA migration.
- **2024–present — Founder, InnovateIT Consulting:** Six Sigma, Lean & Agile advisory for enterprise clients.
- **2022–2024 — Principal Business Operations Specialist, NTT Ltd.:** EUR 500k+ SFDC license savings; harmonized Opp2Cash across 12 regional entities; 21% tool adoption increase.
- **2015–2022 — BT (British Telecom):** $100k+ automation savings; 50% incident volume reduction via PEGA deployments.
- **2010–2015 — Operations Manager, T-Systems:** 30% reduction in customer escalations via service chain redesign.

## Certifications

Six Sigma Green Belt (ASQ), Lean Practitioner, LeanIT Foundation, PRINCE2 Foundation, Change Management Practitioner (APMG), Agile Scrum Master, ITIL Service Operation / Transition / Continual Service Improvement, Business Architect Certified (BQF), Enterprise Architecture Foundations (TOGAF).

## Services offered

- Process Optimization and value stream mapping
- Agile Business Analysis
- Process Evaluation (issues, risks, benefits assessment)
- Performance Reporting (KPIs, measurement systems)
- Requirements Management
- User Testing & Feedback facilitation
- Change Management (adoption frameworks)
- Strategic Process Design & redesign
- Process Ownership (design, document, implement)

## Industries

Telecom, FinTech, ICT, Enterprise SaaS.
